description: Style NoteA powerful shoe, the Mudslide from adidas comes with a leather upper and an aggressive outsole. Styled to look like an outdoors shoe, its comfortable inner is styled like a padded runner's shoe -  a win-win we say!Product DetailsSuede upper with perforations at the toe box for better structure and comfortAdidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brandâ€™s belief in performanceMesh padded tongue provides better breathable comfortPadded collar offers better Fit and a central lace-up system for a snug, customised fitHaul loop on the collar for easy removal of the shoe      Brand name printed on the tongue and below the collarHaul loop on the collar for easy removal of the shoeAggressive TPR outsole comprising of multi-directional lugs on the forefoot, heel and periphery of the foot for better gripMaterial and CareLeather, syntheticRemove dirt with a clean cloth
